offer: For logistics fleet supervisors managing 10-20 vehicles, missed inspections cause compliance penalties. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendars.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling timely vehicle safety inspections.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics fleet supervisors
